calendar.matters:
MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-15-2007 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff in Propria Persona for failure to file Proof of Service, obtain answer or enter default as to Defendant Saboune is heard this day. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter is dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: Mary Ellen Scherer, CSR#5208 (212)

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
